commit.message:
Use hex encoding of `rdvl` instruction to support older compilers

Older versions of Visual Studio don't recognize the `rdvl` instruction,
so as a workaround, this patch replaces the instruction mnemonic with
it's numeric encoding, which was derived from the AArch64 ISA
documentation.  This lets us avoid build errors.  Since the function
that contains this instruction is guarded by `supports_sve()`, we do not
anticipate executing this instruction on machines that don't have SVE
support.
